name: The Ember Nest
description: A vast cavern where the ceiling bristles with cooling vents that rain a constant soft fall of glowing embers, heaping the floor in drifts of warm ash. Great charred bones lie half-buried in the cinders, and the walls are scored with deep, molten claw-marks. This is a den of something that has fed here a long time, and the heat has a watchful, patient quality.
ambient_messages: Embers drift down from the vents above and settle hissing into the ash at your feet.
Something massive shifts in the drifts of cinders, then goes still.
A charred bone cracks somewhere in the dark under a slow, deliberate weight.
